Name: DRAW_CHAR
Description: Draws a single ASCII character to the window.

Name: GET_TICKS
Description: Returns the current system_ticks value into EAX.

Name: SLEEP
Description: Puts the calling task into a SLEEPING state.

Name: EXIT
Description: Kills the current task and frees its window and stack.

Name: PRINT_STR
Description: Prints a literal string from memory.

Name: PRINT_VAR
Description: Prints an integer value as text to the screen.

Name: GETKEY
Description: Returns the next key from the hardware buffer into EAX (0 if empty).
